pi_items.source: Google Play Store (https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.robert.fcView&hl=en_US) - confirmed as real public Android app 'Flight Crew View'
Android developer documentation and battery optimization settings standards - 'unrestricted' is a valid battery optimization state that exempts apps from device idle/doze mode restrictions
Code analysis of verifier.py line 115: 'passed = is_whitelisted and score >= 50' with whitelist check providing 50 points minimum

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a real, public Android application (Flight Crew View, com.robert.fcView, available on Google Play Store) and requires disabling battery optimization by adding it to the device idle whitelist. The expected state 'unrestricted' is the standard Android terminology for apps exempt from battery optimization/doze mode. The pass_threshold of 50 corresponds to the verifier's minimum scoring requirement where the whitelist check alone (50 points) determines success, with additional scoring for app ops permissions (20 pts), settings access confirmation (15 pts), and VLM trajectory verification (15 pts).
